results.title: Senior Data Analyst
results.description:
Are you a Senior Data Analyst with a proven track record of delivering clear business impact through data? We’ve been looking for you!

The data team at Kape is building a world-class, data-driven culture to empower our employees with timely, accurate information to drive their decision making.  

In this role you will make a huge impact, influencing business decisions relating to millions of customers every day. You’ll work with great people on projects across the company, and play a pivotal role in supporting strategic business initiatives through data analysis, experimentation and development of metrics and dashboards.


What you’ll be doing

As a Senior Data Analyst, you will:

  • Act as a strategic partner working in cross functional teams to grow the extent of data-driven planning and decision making in specific areas, specialising in Retention & CRM analytics.

  • Design and evaluate experiments for retention and CRM-related initiatives, such as reducing churn and cancellations, increasing upgrades and upsells, etc.  

  • Partner with web and backend developers to work on the analytics tracking requirements and accuracy of the tracking implementation. 

  • Turn data into insights, predictions, and actionable recommendations, delivering clear business value to your cross functional teams in their business challenges. 

  • Deliver impactful insights and recommendations using compelling visualizations in user-friendly dashboard designs. 

  • Work in partnership with Data Engineers and Analytics Engineers to define data requirements, foundational datasets and ensure high-fidelity tracking.

  • Contribute to the planning & execution of the Retention and CRM team within the organisation - as a group of people, as a partner within cross functional teams and as an enabler to support others to self-serve their data and insight needs.  

Who we’re looking for

Experience & expertise

  • 5+ years in a product analytics, growth or marketing analytics role

  • Hands-on experience with retention and CRM efforts — knowledge of user segmentations and targeting, organic communication channels, such as Braze.

Data mindset & ownership

  • Passionate about data and using it to influence business decisions

  • Detail-oriented in ensuring data quality and integrity across everything you present

  • Self-starter with a strong sense of ownership — you bring insights to life, not just report them

  • Comfortable navigating ambiguity and able to lead complex, loosely-defined projects from first principles through to a clear outcome

Business partnership

  • Adept at integrating with business teams to truly understand their challenges and define how data can help — as early as possible

  • Strong business acumen with a business-first approach to problem framing

  • Track record of delivering clear, actionable business value from data — fit for purpose, not just technically impressive

Communication & storytelling

  • Excellent communicator who uses storytelling to make insights land at the business level

  • Able to connect data narratives to commercial outcomes in a way that resonates across teams

  • Fluent in English

  • Thrives working alongside intelligent, passionate people

Technical skills

  • High proficiency in SQL and/or other querying languages

  • Hands-on experience in Tableau or equivalent data visualisation tools

  • Comfortable working with AI tools and incorporating them into your workflow to move faster and think sharper

Nice to have, but not required 

  • You came from a subscription-based e-commerce company. 

  • A desire to elevate the team by mentoring junior analysts and fostering a culture of peer review and best practices.

  • Machine learning data modelling experience.

results.title: Data Analyst (1 year contract, Life science, Pharmaceutical)
results.description:
Industry: Pharmaceutical / Life Sciences

Role Overview:

The Data Analyst will play a key role in driving the modernization of BIO Lab Management and Analytics through digital transformation. This role focuses on technical data analysis, sample and inventory management, lab analytics, and knowledge management. The analyst will collaborate with cross-functional stakeholders to identify opportunities for improvement, develop sustainable digital solutions, and provide data-driven insights that enhance performance and decision-making.

Key Responsibilities

· Develop and implement digital solutions aligned with stakeholder requirements using appropriate platforms and tools.

• Conduct User Acceptance Testing (UAT) to ensure solutions are efficient, reliable, and user-friendly, incorporating user feedback to improve system functionality and performance.

• Collaborate with IT, Business Excellence, and other internal teams to design and enhance systems for data collection, storage, and analysis.

• Create clear documentation and troubleshooting guides to ensure long-term sustainability of implemented digital tools.

• Perform ad-hoc and exploratory data analyses to address complex business challenges and support ongoing strategic initiatives.

• Identify and interpret key trends from laboratory and process data to support data-driven decision-making.

• Ensure compliance with data governance standards, maintaining consistency in data definitions, sources, and quality.

• Design and optimize data extraction processes to consolidate and standardize information from multiple systems.

• Communicate regularly with management and stakeholders to gather requirements, provide progress updates, and present analytical findings.

• Deliver user training and knowledge transfer sessions to ensure smooth adoption and effective use of digital systems.

Requirements:

• Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Computer Science, Statistics, or any relevant discipline.

• Certification in business data analysis or a related area is an advantage.

• 3–6 years of experience in data analytics, digital transformation, or business analysis within the pharmaceutical or life sciences sector.

• Proficiency in data and digital tools including Microsoft Power Platform (Power BI, PowerApps, Power Automate), Smartsheet, SQL, and Python.

• Proven experience in developing dashboards, reports, and analytics solutions that enhance operational efficiency.

• Strong analytical thinking, data interpretation, and problem-solving abilities.

• Knowledge or experience in BIO manufacturing processes, IT/OT systems, and GxP-compliant environments is preferred.

• Familiarity with data governance principles and basic machine learning applications is beneficial.

If the above role is a good fit for you, or if you know anyone whomight be good for the role, please get in touch with an updated CV and I'll bein touch!

results.title: Data Analyst Intern
results.description:
About Us

Founded in 2014, Lumens Group is leading the transformation of the mobility industry in Singapore. We have successfully built one of Singapore's largest car fleets and expanded our offerings to personal and corporate leasing, purchasing and financing. As we enter a new phase, we're building an integrated ecosystem for merchants and consumers, driven by advanced technology and a mission to enrich everyday life. Now, we're on the lookout for a data analyst intern to join us in Singapore.


Your Role on Our Journey

We are looking for a Data Analyst Intern to support our business teams in making data driven decisions. The intern will work closely with different stakeholders to understand processes and reporting needs and then translate them into automated solutions and dashboards. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, curious, and eager to learn about data analysis and business operations.


Your Day-to-Day Adventures

  • Collaborate with different teams to understand workflows, requirements, and reporting needs.
  • Automate report generation to improve efficiency and reduce manual work.
  • Build, update, and schedule Power BI dashboards for business monitoring.
  • Clean, transform, and prepare data from multiple sources for analysis and automation.
  • Assist in setting up data pipelines to ensure data accuracy, timeliness, and usability.
  • Conduct ad-hoc analyses to provide insights that support business decisions.

What Makes You a Perfect Fit

  • Proficient in Power BI (dashboard creation, scheduling, data modeling).
  • Familiarity with data integration and data pipelining (extracting, cleaning, and preparing data from multiple sources).
  • Basic scripting/programming knowledge (e.g., Python for report automation, data cleaning, or ETL tasks).
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.
  • Good communication skills to translate business needs into technical requirements.

Good to Have (Bonus) Skills

  • Knowledge of SQL for querying and joining datasets.
  • Experience with Excel/Google Sheets for quick analyses.
  • Exposure to ETL tools or cloud data platforms.
  • Basic understanding of data governance, quality checks, and version control.

Ready to Drive the Extra Mile?

Send your resume that showcases your unique spark to us today. If your journey aligns with ours, we'll get in touch soon!

postedCompany.description:
Based in Singapore, Lumens Group is a family of brands offering an ecosystem of services around cars. Our story began as a private hire car leasing company to address the needs of the new sharing economy led by Uber and Grab. Our core business has been leasing to ride hailing drivers and we grew our car fleet to one of the largest in Singapore in under 8 years. During this time, we have expanded our services to personal & corporate vehicle leasing, vehicle purchasing and financing.


Emerging strong from the Covid-19 period, Lumens is building for an exciting new era that brings in a wide range of merchants and individual consumers to our ecosystem. By owning a critical mass of vehicles and driver relationships, we are able to innovate on vehicle setup, driver upskilling & deployment, as well as technology and data capabilities to build mobility platform services that impact our everyday lives.
postedCompany.name: LUMENS PTE. LTD.
